item.title: I am literally at a loss as to what the USA has become
item.dc:creator: ColmMeaney

item.title: “I want to hug my daughter. That’s what I survived for.”
item.description: Meet Yaroslav, callsign ‘Mudryi’ - The Wise One. A few days ago he came back from holding the line for 86 straight days in Sumy region, alongside his brother-in-arms ‘Gnom’. Before the war, he was a sculptor and painter. On February 24, 2022, he enlisted. He repairs drones directly on position. He writes poetry between missions. When asked what keeps him going he just said ‘My daughter motivates me. I know where my place is. I am where I belong.’ This is who is defending Ukraine. Video: @AFUStratCom / YouTube
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 420
item.description:
Fun fact - female reindeers keep their antlers for longer than non-castrated males. Santas reindeers are either castrated males, or they’re female (and also quite possibly pregnant).
We *love* your ideas!
The rest of the dump is going to be shit like this. Soz. (Also there’s been absolutely zero fact-checking)

item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Mission Control - Apollo 17 (1972) vs. Artemis II (2026)
item.description: We. Fucking. Did. It! First moonshot since I was 1-yo and I am crying. Gen X mostly missed the moonshots, but we saw the Challenger explode live from our school cafeterias. This means a lot to us. A lot. And whether you're older or younger than me, I hope it means as much to you.
item.dc:creator: shalafi71

26 Imgur Artist Spotlight: Hadn't featured anything by @domiboshoi in a while and I love her work so much. Go check out more in her posts.
27 Man Tax: Nathan Fillion
"To understand the heart and mind of a person, look not at what he has already achieved, but what he aspires to.” - Khalil Gibran So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: This is America
item.description: Search, "police report man found hanging from tree." I don't know, maybe I'm the weird one, but if you think of suicide do you think, "I should go hang myself from a tree in a public space, but leave no note."?

item.title: GovBrief Today #426
item.description: Donald Trump went on national television tonight to declare victory in a war that has driven American troops out of their own bases. His first primetime address about the war came 35 days in and answered nothing. He said the objectives are "nearing completion," then promised to bomb Iran "extremely hard" for two to three more weeks and bring them "back to the stone ages where they belong." He threatened to destroy their power grid and desalination plants if they don't make a deal. More troops and warships are pouring into the region. The Pentagon is ordering prefab bunkers shipped to the Gulf because multiple American bases are all but uninhabitable, according to the New York Times. Troops have been relocated to hotels and office buildings, mixing military personnel with civilians in ways that may violate the Pentagon's own Law of War Manual and the Geneva Conventions. Iran is already targeting those hotels. That is what winning looks like to this commander in chief. Tell your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls that 19 minutes of victory rhetoric don't answer the question Congress still refuses to ask: what is the plan to end this war? We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 426 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260401-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/rodriguez-sanctions [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr01 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/us-troops-hotels [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-address [5] https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-testing-pause [6] https://go.govbrief.today/epa-methane [7] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis-launch [8] https://go.govbrief.today/voa-stay [9] https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-trouble [10] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-birthright [11] https://go.govbrief.today/cfpb-plan [12] https://go.govbrief.today/shahalam-homicide [13] https://go.govbrief.today/patrol-warrants [14] https://go.govbrief.today/medicaid-data-ice [15] https://go.govbrief.today/phillips-truthsocial [16] https://go.govbrief.today/mullin-contracts [17] https://go.govbrief.today/trump250-merch [18] https://go.govbrief.today/dems-sue-ballots Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Israel is truly the worst of us. Free Palestine
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: Day Ten Weigh-In
item.description:
I had an amazing evening hanging out with a local Imgurian, @SpaceJew. He lives really close to me so I took a huge risk and gave him my address. Turns out - he is NOT a serial killer haha. I asked him to help me weigh the babies. Here we go!
I let him put them on the scale. He was SO gentle. Number One Jaime is up 13 grams!
Number Two Adilene is also up 13 grams!
The freaking runt of the litter, Number Three Alis, is only up five grams. Gosh darnit. But it IS a gain
Number Four Ever (@SpaceJew’s favorite) is up 8 grams.
Number Five Josefina is up 12 grams!
And Number Six Jorge is up only six grams. He and Alis usually respond very well to syringe feeding, so I’m gonna do that tonight.
@runesky, do your thing!
The fact that their eyes are open mean they are moving around more, so they’re burning more calories. They’re gaining, that’s all that matters
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: She got the seal of approval
item.dc:creator: Zakiamon

item.title: Mama was NOT a fan
item.description: I changed out the blankets in the cat cave a few minutes ago - it was time - and mama Bobbie let me know she was NOT ok with it. She growls occasionally, and this was one of those moments. I never worried she was gonna attack me or anything, I know she trusts me and I trust her. And now the babies have a fresh, clean, comfy place to be! She’s fine with it now. It was worth it, mama
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
